en: Got in at noon, left at midnight. That's a long day.
ko: 정오에 들어와서 자정에 나갔어요. 긴 하루였네요.
ja: 昼に来て、夜中に帰った。
vi: Den luc trua, di luc nua dem.

en: Good for you. Nothing wrong with a hard day's work.
ko: 힘든 하루 일하는 건 나쁘지 않아요.
ja: 一生懸命働くのは悪いことじゃない。
vi: Lam viec cham chi khong co gi sai.

en: So you say a man came in, and he reached across the counter
ja: カウンター越しに手を伸ばして、
zhTW: 他伸手過櫃檯，引用一下，
vi: va voi tay qua quay, nguyen van,

en: and, quote, he grabbed up the money from my register
ko: 내 금고에서 돈을 집어들고 도망쳤어요. 맞아요.
ja: レジからお金をつかんで逃げた。
zhTW: 他搶了我收銀機裡的錢就跑了。是的。
vi: anh ta gom tien tu may tinh tien roi chay. Vang.

ko: 내 금고에서 돈을 집어들고 도망쳤어요. 맞아요.
ja: レジからお金をつかんで逃げた。
zhTW: 他搶了我收銀機裡的錢就跑了。是的。
vi: anh ta gom tien tu may tinh tien roi chay. Vang.

en: And there was no one else in the store? Not at that time, no.
ja: 店に他に誰もいなかった。
vi: Luc do khong co ai khac trong cua hang.

en: And since the camera system wasn't working at the time, you're the only one who saw the perpetrator.
ja: カメラが動いてなかったから、
zhTW: 既然攝影系統當時沒在運作，
vi: Vi he thong camera luc do khong hoat dong,

en: Yeah. So this person came in, and they bought something.
ko: 그래서 이 사람이 들어와서 뭔가를 샀어요.
ja: その人が入ってきて何かを買った。
zhTW: 是的，所以這個人進來買了東西。
vi: Vang, nguoi nay vao va mua do.

en: I think it was an Almond Joy. They bought an Almond Joy.
ja: アーモンドジョイだったと思う。
vi: Toi nghi la mot thanh Almond Joy.

en: And when you rang them up, that's when they snatched the cash from the register.
zhTW: 就是那時他們從收銀機搶走了現金。
vi: do la luc ho cuop tien tu may tinh tien.

en: Sounds like it happened pretty fast. But you say you got a good look at him, correct?
zhTW: 但你說你看得很清楚，對嗎?是的。
vi: nhung ban noi ban nhin ro, dung khong? Vang.

en: Yes. You must drink stronger coffee than I do,
ko: 당신은 제가 마시는 것보다 더 강한 커피를 마시는군요.
ja: あなたは私より強いコーヒーを飲んでるに違いない。
zhTW: 你一定喝比我強的咖啡，
vi: Ban chac phai uong ca phe manh hon toi,

en: because after 11 hours on the job, I can barely see straight.
zhTW: 因為工作十一個小時後，
vi: vi sau muoi mot tieng lam viec,

en: And it was dark out. Oh, he's the only guy that came in that night
